notes: Punto Solidario is a Dominican Republic single-window social-subsidy service run by ADESS / Supérate (Gabinete de Coordinación de Políticas Sociales). The adaptor exposes no documented public operations (ast operations[] is empty); it is a thin HTTP client with generic http get/post/request helpers over a configured base URL. No public vendor API/machine spec exists (the platform is government-internal). Synthesized a minimal OpenAPI 3.0 from the adaptor surface, modeling representative beneficiary, subsidy and payment-transaction resources with Spanish field names matching the domain. Server URL, paths and field names are best-effort placeholders.
